rationale: Documentation improvement: adding a 'How to Ask for Help' section to the GitHub readme.
API ergonomics bug: None argument handling mismatch between docstring and implementation in MongoClient.
Feature request to add socketKeepAlive socket option; no spec requirement involved.
Slow connection with one replica set member down; PHP reference is background context, not cross-driver inconsistency.
API ergonomics improvement: seed ordering behavior for MongoReplicaSetClient initialization. No spec rule violated.
API ergonomics: database.dereference() not passing kwargs to find_one(); no spec requirement involved.
Auth failure after version upgrade; insufficient detail to identify which specific spec rule was violated.
Semaphore/connection pool deadlock when threads wait; implementation bug with no specific contradicted spec rule.
KeyError parsing mongos error response with missing 'errmsg' key; server-side quirk, not a spec deviation.
GridFS float chunkSize from buggy Lua driver; tolerance for non-spec input, no spec rule violated.
Thread hangs on monitor.join() during test suite teardown; internal threading issue, no spec rule involved.
GridFS index creation race condition; implementation/compatibility bug with older MongoDB server, no spec deviation.
Spec requires w=1 to be sent explicitly to override getLastErrorDefaults; driver omits it silently.
Internal SON performance optimization; no behavior change, no spec rule involved.
ExecutionTimeout not raised on tailable cursor timeout; ambiguous whether spec mandates this specific exception type.
Regression bug in GridOut._connect=False path from PYTHON-749 fix; internal implementation error, not a spec deviation.
API deprecation of copy_database helper; no spec requirement involved.
API deprecation of start_request(); no spec requirement involved.
API deprecation of MasterSlaveConnection; no spec requirement involved.
Documentation: explaining deprecation policy and compatibility; no spec involvement.
URI parser fails on passwords containing slashes; connection string spec requires proper percent-encoding handling.
TypeError in Pool.__del__ during mod_wsgi process restart; internal lifecycle issue, no spec rule violated.
Documentation typo: GridFS default chunk size value in API docs; no spec deviation.
User-reported incompatibility between PHP and Python data; description too thin to identify a specific spec violation.
API removal of copy_database helper method; no spec requirement involved.
json_util.loads fails to parse $timestamp; BSON Extended JSON handling bug; unclear if a formal spec mandates this.
disconnect() doesn't unblock waiting threads; implementation deadlock bug, no spec rule specifies this behavior.
Python type-check bug: basestring.__name missing parentheses causes TypeError; internal code defect, not a spec violation.
Adding CodecOptions class to encapsulate BSON codec options; API refactoring, not a spec conformance fix.
Adding get_database/get_collection API methods; new API design, not a spec conformance fix.
Internal refactoring: Database.command bypasses Collection.find(); performance/architecture improvement, no spec deviation.
API redesign: removing per-helper read_preference parameter, adding with_options; ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Adding cursor support for listCollections/listIndexes commands; new server feature support, not a spec conformance fix.
Command cursor ns value not always used for OP_GET_MORE; depends on DRIVERS-198, suggesting a spec-required behavior.
Adding codec/read/write params to create_collection; API improvement, not a spec conformance fix.
Removing start_request() API; planned feature removal, no spec rule mandates or prohibits requests.
Reworking WriteConcern class to immutable container with validation; internal API refactoring, not a spec deviation.
distinct() missing filter argument; feature gap vs mongo shell behavior, but unclear if spec mandates this parameter.
DRIVERS-908 specifies hint support for delete command; driver lacked required spec behavior.
Documenting hidden index option per DRIVERS-816 spec; linked to DRIVERS coordination ticket for spec rollout.
Bug: create_index passes name=None to server rather than ignoring it; docstring/behavior mismatch, no spec rule violated.
MongoRecord ORM framework bug: save() inserts instead of updating; ORM layer above driver, not a driver spec issue.
MongoRecord ORM Ruby const_get bug for namespaced class names; ORM layer bug, no spec involvement.
Drop method calling dropIndexes first; insufficient detail to determine spec involvement.
Ruby Hash default value causes _id:0 during BSON serialize; Ruby-specific implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Insert not including _id in result when C extension enabled; insufficient detail to determine spec involvement.
Integer overflow should raise exception; insufficient detail to determine if this contradicts a specific spec rule.
Missing prevError helper method; legacy pre-spec feature, no cross-driver spec requirement involved.
Disallow $ key names on insert; insufficient detail; unclear if spec mandates this validation.
Bug: dot-notation keys rejected in create_index when they should be allowed for embedded fields; driver code bug.
